scripts.worker: uv run --project . celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app --workdir apps/api worker --loglevel=info
scripts.beat: uv run --project . celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app --workdir apps/api beat --loglevel=info
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check apps/api && uv run ruff format --check apps/api && uv run mypy apps/api/app
